plugins.name: contextspin
plugins.description: Live context in your Claude Code status bar — weather, Hacker News, AI research papers, dev articles, PRs awaiting review, CI failures, incidents, meetings. Auto-configures on install; never an empty bar.

plugins.name: recallcheck
plugins.description: Quiz yourself on the code you just wrote — an on-demand /recallcheck:recall-check comprehension self-check on your current diff, plus optional non-blocking nudges before you push or open an MR. No scoring, no gating.
